title: Fix edhoc_kdf implementation, signature, CBOR encoding per RFC 9528
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:248-302. Function references undefined 'th', has wrong info construction order (should follow EDHOC-KDF spec for HKDF-Expand info). Make it match python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py:_edhoc_kdf exactly. Add proper TH param.
